title: P0: Fix InventorySyncLoop not syncing during active goals
description:
The periodic inventory sync loop (AgentBackgroundService.InventorySyncLoopAsync) only enqueues GetStatus when the agent is idle AND inventory is stale. The stale flag is only set by SetGoal(), and during active goals no periodic sync occurs. Drift accumulates silently until goal completion.

The WorldStateProjector.ApplyBlockMined explicitly acknowledges double-counting and relies on periodic GetStatus for reconciliation — but the guard prevents this from happening during active goals.

Fix: Remove the `_currentGoal is not null` guard. Sync periodically regardless of goal state, possibly at a longer interval during active goals (e.g., 60s instead of 30s).

Also fix the stacked-delay bug: the initial Task.Delay(30s) and the loop-top Task.Delay(30s) stack, so the first sync fires at 60s, not 30s. Move loop delay to bottom of while body.

Source: internal-audit-57-20260701.md — P0-3, P3-5
